cyth.files.builtin.cy:
class Image
  int id
  int width
  int height
  char[] data

  void __init__(int width, int height)
    this.id = createImage(width, height)
    this.width = width
    this.height = height
    this.data.reserve(width * height * 3)

  void clear()
    clearImage(this)

  void draw()
    image(this, 0, 0)

  void draw(int x, int y)
    image(this, x, y)

class Size
  int width
  int height
